supply_chain.dependencies: Sole and single-source suppliers for certain instruments, components, raw materials and consumables. Certain Catalyst chemistry slides supplied exclusively by Ortho-Clinical Diagnostics under agreements through 2044. Many products purchased from sole or single-source suppliers are proprietary or complex and cannot be readily replaced.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions, sole/single-source supplier dependencies, inability to obtain adequate quantities from suppliers, potential loss of supply agreements, inflationary pressures on costs, logistics challenges, extended shipping periods and delays, product and component availability issues, tariffs and duties on imported goods

regulatory_risks: FDA regulations on veterinary medical devices and human point-of-care products
USDA APHIS licensing requirements for veterinary diagnostic products
EPA approval requirements for water testing products
EU Medical Device Regulation and In Vitro Diagnostic Medical Devices Regulation
EU REACH chemical substance restrictions
EU RoHS Directive on hazardous substances
EU Biocidal Products Regulation
EU WEEE Directive
EU Electromagnetic Compatibility Directive
EU GDPR data privacy regulations
California Proposition 65 chemical exposure warnings
PFAS regulations and phase-out requirements (Maine, EPA, EU)
EU Artificial Intelligence Act
Country-specific product registration and approval requirements (Japan, Germany, Canada, Brazil, Netherlands, China)
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and UK Bribery Act compliance
Import/export control and sanctions laws
Anti-competition regulations (FTC)
State consumer privacy laws (California CPRA)
China Personal Information Protection Law
Brazilian General Data Protection Law
South African Protection of Personal Information Act
Japanese Act on the Protection of Personal Information
New Zealand Privacy Act
Australian Privacy and Other Legislation Amendment Bill
India Digital Personal Data Protection Act
EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive
California Climate Corporate Data Accountability Act
California Climate-Related Financial Risk Act
OECD Pillar Two Global Minimum Tax
Tax Cuts and Jobs Act provisions effective 2026

sanction_risks: International conflicts and tensions may result in uncertainty, volatility in exchange rates, tariffs, and inflationary trends
Trade protection measures, quotas, embargoes, import/export restrictions on key components
Geopolitical crises including terrorism, war, armed conflict, or civil or military unrest
Increased border protection and restriction on travel
Currency control restrictions limiting fund transfers (approximately USD $1.0 million in restricted cash as of December 31, 2024)
